calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Patricia Abalos.
Petitioner: DEBRA JOENE DERABASSE, present in pro per was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: DEBRA CATHERINE BENEDICT.
Decree signed in open court.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Text Ruling
